title: (Bullish Signal) ZTO, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling ZTO's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. A.I. dvisor identified 38 similar cases where ZTO's MACD histogram became positive, and 31 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $32.66 crossed the support line at $30.44 and is trading between $36.80 resistance and $30.44 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/20/21 - 05/20/21, the price experienced a +9% Uptrend. During the week of 05/13/21 - 05/20/21, the stock enjoyed a +10% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/oiibx1ujxh071.png?width=1427&format=png&auto=webp&s=deea7e1ee3fa0c416f80a43f6d492ac54fea61c4

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 20, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ZTO as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 61 of 77 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ZTO just turned positive on May 20, 2021. Looking at past instances where ZTO's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 31 of 38 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The 10-day Moving Average for ZTO crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on April 30, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 13 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

Following a +4.36% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ZTO advanced for three days, in 251 of 317 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

ZTO may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. In 222 of 271 cases where ZTO Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 82%.
